tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Band: The Killers
Song: Mr Brightside
Tabber: James Simmons
Comments: Quite an old song now but i play this acoustically and it sounds
so good. I put a capo on fret 2 because it suits my voice but it can be played
without.

Chords:
              eadgbe
       [ch]Dsus2[/ch] (xx0230)
   [ch]Dmaj7sus2[/ch] (x40230)
         [ch]G/A[/ch] (3x0230)
        [ch]Bm/A[/ch] (x20230)
       [ch]Asus4[/ch] (x02230)

it doesnt take a genius to work out this song is based around the shape and sound
of Dsus2 as every chord is shaped around the (xx0230)


[Intro/Verse 1]

this is repeated throughout the intro as well as verse 1, the chords are tabbed
below for those that wish to strum

[tab]e|------------0------------------0----------------0----------------0---------|
b|------3---3---3----------3---3---3--------3---3---3--------3---3---3-------|
g|----2---2-------2------2---2-------2----2---2-------2----2---2-------2-----|
d|--0------------------------------------------------------------------------|
a|---------------------4-----------------------------------------------------|
e|--------------------------------------3----------------3-------------------|[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab]    [ch]Dsus2[/ch]                    [ch]Dmaj7sus2[/ch]
        I'm coming out of my cage[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]G/A[/ch]
        And I’ve been doing just fine[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G/A[/ch]
        Gotta gotta be down[/tab]

        Because I want it all
[tab]    [ch]Dsus2[/ch]                     [ch]Dmaj7sus2[/ch]
        It started out with a kiss[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]G/A[/ch]
        How did it end up like this[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]G/A[/ch]
        It was only a kiss, it was only a kiss[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dsus2[/ch]                [ch]Dmaj7sus2[/ch]
        Now I’m falling asleep[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]G/A[/ch]
        And she’s calling a cab[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]G/A[/ch]
        While he’s having a smoke[/tab]

        And she’s taking a drag
[tab]     [ch]Dsus2[/ch]                   [ch]Dmaj7sus2[/ch]
        Now they’re going to bed[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]G/A[/ch]
        And my stomach is sick[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G/A[/ch]
        And it’s all in my head[/tab]

        But she’s touching his


[Bridge]

[tab]        [ch]Bm/A[/ch]
        chest[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Asus4[/ch]
        Now, he takes off her dress[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G/A[/ch]
        Now, let me go[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm/A[/ch]                       [ch]Asus4[/ch]
        And I just can’t look its killing me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G/A[/ch]
        And taking control[/tab]


[Chorus 1]

[tab]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]     [ch]G/A[/ch]              [ch]Bm/A[/ch]
        Jealousy, turning saints into the sea[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Asus4[/ch]                 [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
        Swimming through sick lullabies[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G/A[/ch]             [ch]Bm/A[/ch]
        Choking on your alibis[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Asus4[/ch]             [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
        But it’s just the price I pay[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G/A[/ch]        [ch]Bm/A[/ch]
        Destiny is calling me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Asus4[/ch]      [ch]Dsus2[/ch]    [ch]G/A[/ch]
        Open up my eager eyes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm/A[/ch]           [ch]Asus4[/ch]
        ‘Cause I’m Mr Brightside[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Dsus2[/ch]                    [ch]Dmaj7sus2[/ch]
        I'm coming out of my cage[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]G/A[/ch]
        And I’ve been doing just fine[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G/A[/ch]
        Gotta gotta be down[/tab]

        Because I want it all
[tab]    [ch]Dsus2[/ch]                     [ch]Dmaj7sus2[/ch]
        It started out with a kiss[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]G/A[/ch]
        How did it end up like this[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]G/A[/ch]
        It was only a kiss, it was only a kiss[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dsus2[/ch]                [ch]Dmaj7sus2[/ch]
        Now I’m falling asleep[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]G/A[/ch]
        And she’s calling a cab[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]G/A[/ch]
        While he’s having a smoke[/tab]

        And she’s taking a drag
[tab]     [ch]Dsus2[/ch]                   [ch]Dmaj7sus2[/ch]
        Now they’re going to bed[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]G/A[/ch]
        And my stomach is sick[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G/A[/ch]
        And it’s all in my head[/tab]

        But she’s touching his


[Bridge]

[tab]        [ch]Bm/A[/ch]
        chest[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Asus4[/ch]
        Now, he takes off her dress[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G/A[/ch]
        Now, let me go[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm/A[/ch]                       [ch]Asus4[/ch]
        And I just can’t look its killing me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G/A[/ch]
        And taking control[/tab]


[Chorus 2]

[tab]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]     [ch]G/A[/ch]              [ch]Bm/A[/ch]
        Jealousy, turning saints into the sea[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Asus4[/ch]                 [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
        Swimming through sick lullabies[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G/A[/ch]             [ch]Bm/A[/ch]
        Choking on your alibis[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Asus4[/ch]             [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
        But it’s just the price I pay[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G/A[/ch]        [ch]Bm/A[/ch]
        Destiny is calling me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Asus4[/ch]      [ch]Dsus2[/ch]    [ch]G/A[/ch]
        Open up my eager eyes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm/A[/ch]           [ch]Asus4[/ch]
        ‘Cause I’m Mr Brightside[/tab]


[Outro] 

this is optional but in my opinion its a good way to end it

Please rate!
